Title: Minor fix to previous patch for CVE-2022-35918
Description: The initial vulnerability identified in Streamlit apps using custom components, allowing for directory traversal attacks, was addressed in version 1.11.1. However, a minor issue persisted, which could still potentially expose certain files on the server file-system under specific conditions.
NotImpacted: All versions before 0.63.0, all versions starting from 1.30.0
